title: MinecraftCapes | Wear any cape, cost free
description: Custom Capes anyone with the mod can see
body:
![MinecraftCapes Header Logo](https://minecraftcapes.net/images/capes-meta.jpg?1)

MinecraftCapes is a client side mod which allows you to wear any cape you wish in-game, cost free. Getting our mod working correctly is easy, just follow the steps below.

We have over 1,400,000+ users enjoying their free capes. You can upload any cape you like, or make your own! 

When you install the mod, you can also see anyone elses capes, no server mod or plugins required!

**Don't bother paying for capes or "cloaks" from clients or other services which exploit children, instead use our mod and have any cape you want FOR FREE!**

![License agreement](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/52ed4d82c6880ad1d5162074ed131a074df93149.png)

## **Website, Gallery, Cape Creators and more can be found here:**
## [https://minecraftcapes.net/](https://minecraftcapes.net/)

## Why do I need to use the website?
To upload and manage your capes/ears, we need a way to verify that you actually own the Minecraft account you're linking. This prevents other players from uploading capes/ears to accounts they don't own.

Choose how you verify: 
- Use our in-game verification server or official Microsoft OAuth.
- We never asks for your account password.
- In-game verification doesn't require any Microsoft sign-in at all.
- Our Microsoft OAuth application is approved by Mojang/Microsoft before it can access Minecraft account information.
- The mod is fully open source. 

## **Features**
- Pixel Capes
- HD Capes
- Animated Capes
- Enchanted Capes
- Dinnerbone Feature
- Deadmau5 Feature

# **Still feeling a little stuck?**
You can [join our discord](https://minecraftcapes.co.uk/discord). We will help you with any crashes. 

## **How to install**

1. Download and install Fabric, Forge or NeoForge
2. Download the mod and place it in the .minecraft/mods folder.
3. Upload a cape to [https://minecraftcapes.net](https://minecraftcapes.net)

**You have your cape!**
